name: 拉蒂亞的骰子之旅 - 療癒系冒險RPG

detail.description:
Simply roll the dice to embark on a relaxing adventure.

【Ladia's Dicetiny: The Dice of Destiny Guides a Heartwarming Journey】
Ladia, a divine swordswoman blessed with "eternity,"

embarks on a journey of purification to find the meaning of her existence.

🎲 Unique "Dice Exploration × RPG Growth"

Through simple dice rolls, personally experience your character's gradual growth on the journey.

We've designed the game to be enjoyable in just 5 minutes,
